Simple process

How it works

Getting covered is simple. Register your boat, pay securely online, and we handle the rest.

01

Register Your Boat

Fill out your boat details and address. We use your location to match you with the closest certified dealer in your area.

02

Pay Securely Online

Complete your $4,000 annual contract payment through our secure Stripe checkout. Your contract activates immediately.

03

Stay Protected

Your assigned dealer will reach out to schedule your services. Enjoy the water knowing everything is covered.

What's included

Twelve services.
One flat rate.

Every Whitestone Partners contract covers twelve core services your boat needs year after year.

01

Basic Summer Prep Inboard

Full inboard engine commissioning to get your vessel ready for the season.

02

Basic Summer Prep Outboard

Complete outboard engine commissioning and seasonal readiness inspection.

03

Fuel System Service

Fuel filter replacement, line inspection, and fuel system performance check.

04

Impeller Cooling System Service

Water pump impeller inspection and replacement to protect engine cooling.

05

Engine Oil Service

Full engine oil and filter replacement using manufacturer-specified grade.

06

Transmission Oil Service

Transmission fluid inspection, replacement, and shift cable adjustment.

07

Outdrive Service

Outdrive fluid service, bellows inspection, and anode check.

08

Drivetrain Alignment Service

Drive alignment check and adjustment for optimal performance.

09

V Drive Oil Service

V-drive gear oil inspection and replacement for smooth power transfer.

10

Brake Fluid Service Flush

Complete brake fluid flush and replacement for safe stopping performance.

11

Trailer Tire Rotation

Trailer tire rotation and inspection to maximize tire life and towing safety.

12

Full Trailer Service

Comprehensive trailer inspection including bearings, brakes, lights, and frame.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing

One flat annual rate. No hidden fees, no per-service charges.

Questions

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about your Whitestone Partners contract.

What does the contract cover?⌄
Your contract covers twelve essential services: Basic Summer Prep Inboard, Basic Summer Prep Outboard, Fuel System Service, Impeller Cooling System Service, Engine Oil Service, Transmission Oil Service, Outdrive Service, Drivetrain Alignment Service, V Drive Oil Service, Brake Fluid Service Flush, Trailer Tire Rotation, and Full Trailer Service.
How much does it cost?⌄
The annual contract is $4,000 per year — a flat rate covering all twelve services with no additional charges.
Who performs the services?⌄
All services are performed by certified Whitestone Partners dealers. After you register, we match you with a dealer in your area.
What happens after I pay?⌄
After payment you'll receive a confirmation and our team will reach out within 1-2 business days to assign your certified dealer. Your dealer will then contact you to schedule services.
How do I schedule a service?⌄
Once enrolled, your assigned dealer will contact you to schedule services. You can also reach out to them directly anytime.
Is my payment secure?⌄
Yes — all payments are processed securely through Stripe. Your card details never touch our servers.
What boats are eligible?⌄
Most recreational powerboats are eligible. Contact us at ben@whitestone-partners.com with questions about your specific vessel.
Can I transfer my contract if I sell my boat?⌄
Yes — contracts may be transferred to a new owner subject to approval by Whitestone Partners LLC. Contact us to initiate a transfer.

Ready to protect your boat?

Join boat owners who trust Whitestone Partners to keep their vessels running season after season.

Our story

Built for boat owners.
Backed by the industry.

Whitestone Partners was founded with a simple belief — boat owners deserve a better way to protect their investment, and dealers deserve a better way to build recurring revenue.

"We built Whitestone Partners to bring simplicity, transparency, and trust to boat maintenance — one contract at a time."
— Whitestone Partners LLC, St. George, Utah

Who we are

A new standard for
marine service contracts

Whitestone Partners LLC is a boat service contract company based in St. George, Utah. We partner with certified marine dealers across the country to deliver comprehensive annual maintenance contracts to boat owners.

Our program is built on a dealer-first model — we believe the best people to service your boat are the ones you already trust. By working exclusively through our certified dealer network, we ensure every service is performed by qualified professionals who know your vessel.

We handle the contracts, the billing, and the administration. Dealers handle the work they're already great at. Boat owners get peace of mind. Everyone wins.

Transparency

One flat rate, no hidden fees, no surprises at checkout.

Reliability

Certified dealers, documented service history, consistent standards.

Simplicity

One contract covers everything your boat needs for a full year.

Partnership

We succeed when our dealers and customers succeed. That's the model.

Terms & Conditions
Please read this agreement carefully before registering your boat or purchasing a contract.
1. Contract Overview

Whitestone Partners LLC offers annual boat maintenance contracts covering twelve (12) core services performed by our certified dealer network. The contract is valid for one (1) year from the date of activation.

2. Covered Services

Your contract covers twelve essential services including Basic Summer Prep, Fuel System Service, Impeller Service, Engine Oil Service, Transmission Oil Service, Outdrive Service, Drivetrain Alignment, V Drive Oil Service, Brake Fluid Flush, Trailer Tire Rotation, and Full Trailer Service. Service eligibility is determined by engine hours and/or seasonal requirements.

3. Exclusions

This contract does not cover repairs from misuse or neglect; accident or weather damage; major parts replacement; services not listed above; costs exceeding approved reimbursement rates; commercial use vessels; or pre-existing conditions at time of purchase.

4. Dealer Network

All covered services must be performed by a Whitestone Partners certified dealer. Services performed by non-certified dealers will not be covered under this contract.

5. Cancellation Policy

Cancellation and refund terms will be provided at the time of contract purchase. Whitestone Partners LLC reserves the right to cancel this contract for fraudulent claims, vessel ineligibility, or violation of these terms.

6. Limitation of Liability

Whitestone Partners LLC's total liability shall not exceed the original contract price. We are not liable for incidental or consequential damages including loss of use of the vessel.

7. Dispute Resolution

Disputes shall be submitted to good-faith negotiation first. If unresolved within 30 days, disputes will be resolved by binding arbitration.

8. Contact

Whitestone Partners LLC — ben@whitestone-partners.com — St. George, Utah

Last updated 2026. Download the full PDF above for the complete legal document.
